intent: Provide curated discovery seeds so EventBear discovery starts from repo-near civic/public-event/source-family signals before broad GitHub text search dominates.

priorityRepos.description: Static site with a calendar of scraped civic and public events from City Scrapers projects.
priorityRepos.why: Strong public-event intake and civic source-family signal.

priorityRepos.description: Civic scraper family for public information and municipal-style source intake patterns.

referenceRepos.description: Agenda scraper signal that may be useful for audit and comparison, but should not dominate the top list.
referenceRepos.why: Boundary repo for agenda-style intake patterns.

negativeRepos.why: Framework and UI noise, not worker-core relevant.
Generic list-style repo that should not rank as a target-relevant discovery hit.
